meta.title: Dexora — Daily Pokémon GO Assistant & Collection Tracker
meta.description: Dexora is your daily Pokémon GO companion — home dashboard, living dex tracking, raid & PvP intelligence, Trainer Vision, and 13 languages. Free on Google Play.

language.title: Language
language.previewHint: Tap a language to preview instantly

hero.copy: Track your living dex, plan hunts, and get smarter battle insights — built for trainers who play every day.
hero.playStoreNote: Free on Android · iOS coming soon

showcase.copy: One home dashboard. Priorities, collection progress, battle intelligence, events, and community — everything you need before you leave the house.
showcase.coreDailyText: Priorities, today's hunt, daily missions, and event-aware hero — every time you open Dexora.
showcase.coreCollectionText: Living dex, shinies, megas, hundos, and milestone rings — synced securely to the cloud with Google sign-in.
showcase.coreBattleText: Raid ratings, PvP tiers, Rocket counters, and AI recommendations per Pokémon.
showcase.highlightVisionText: Scan screenshots to identify Pokémon, IVs, and catch opportunities instantly with on-device OCR.
showcase.highlightCatchText: Weekly raid targets sync automatically. Track pending and caught Pokémon.
showcase.highlightPokedexText: {{speciesCount}} species with GO stats, moves, and artwork cached on device.
showcase.highlightEventsText: Community Day, GO Fest, and live events with move pools, bonuses, and countdown reminders.
showcase.highlightCommunityText: Friend codes, group chat, raid coordination, and moderation tools — connect with trainers worldwide.
showcase.highlightLanguagesText: Full app localization — English, Deutsch, Français, Español, and 9 more, including Arabic and Hebrew.
showcase.ctaNote: Trusted by trainers syncing {{speciesCount}}+ species offline

waitlist.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
waitlist.success: You're on the list! We'll notify you at launch.
